codeReview.summary: The notification system feature is fully implemented and verified. The implementation covers all four validation assertions: D-Bus notifications (VAL-NOTIF-001), notification ring (VAL-NOTIF-002), notification badge (VAL-NOTIF-003), and notification panel (VAL-NOTIF-004). The code is well-structured with proper C/GTK4 patterns.

summary: Review of notifications-system feature: All code implementation is complete and correct. The D-Bus notification system uses GDBusConnection with notify-send fallback. Notification ring is implemented via CSS (.notification-ring class with blue border). Badge shows unread count on sidebar tabs. Panel is toggleable with Ctrl+Shift+N. The worker verified the implementation by building, running socket tests (35 passed), and launching main_gui which outputs all validation assertions passing. No code changes in commit 000e8ac - it was a rebuild. The feature was already implemented in prior commits.
